en: O LORD, God of vengeance, O God of vengeance, shine forth!
zh: 耶和華啊！你是伸冤的 神； 伸冤的 神啊！求你顯出榮光。

en: Rise up, O judge of the earth; repay to the proud what they deserve!
zh: 審判大地的主啊！求你起來， 使驕傲的人得到應得的報應。

en: O LORD, how long shall the wicked, how long shall the wicked exult?
zh: 耶和華啊！惡人得意要到幾時呢？ 惡人歡樂要到幾時呢？

en: They pour out their arrogant words; all the evildoers boast.
zh: 他們不住地說驕傲的話， 所有作孽的人都誇耀自己。

en: They crush your people, O LORD, and afflict your heritage.
zh: 耶和華啊！他們欺壓你的子民， 苦害你的產業。

en: They kill the widow and the sojourner, and murder the fatherless;
zh: 他們殺死寡婦和寄居的， 又殺害孤兒。

en: and they say, "The LORD does not see; the God of Jacob does not perceive."
zh: 他們還說：“耶和華必看不見， 雅各的 神並不留意。”

en: Understand, O dullest of the people! Fools, when will you be wise?
zh: 民間的愚昧人哪！你們要留心； 愚頑人哪！你們要到幾時才能明白呢？

en: He who planted the ear, does he not hear? He who formed the eye, does he not see?
zh: 那造耳朵的，自己不能聽見嗎？ 那造眼睛的，自己不能看見嗎？

en: He who disciplines the nations, does he not rebuke? He who teaches man knowledge-
zh: 那管教萬國的，不施行審判嗎？ 那教導人的，自己沒有知識嗎？

en: the LORD- knows the thoughts of man, that they are but a breath.
zh: 耶和華知道人的意念是虛妄的。

en: Blessed is the man whom you discipline, O LORD, and whom you teach out of your law,
zh: 耶和華啊！你所管教， 用律法教導的人，是有福的。

en: to give him rest from days of trouble, until a pit is dug for the wicked.
zh: 在患難的日子，你使他得享平安， 直到為惡人所預備的坑挖好了。

en: For the LORD will not forsake his people; he will not abandon his heritage;
zh: 因為耶和華必不丟棄他的子民， 必不離棄他的產業。

en: for justice will return to the righteous, and all the upright in heart will follow it.
zh: 因為審判必再轉向公義， 所有心裡正直的都必順從。

en: Who rises up for me against the wicked? Who stands up for me against evildoers?
zh: 誰肯為我起來攻擊作惡的人呢？ 誰肯為我挺身而起對抗作孽的人呢？

en: If the LORD had not been my help, my soul would soon have lived in the land of silence.
zh: 如果不是耶和華幫助我， 我早就不在人世了 。

en: When I thought, "My foot slips," your steadfast love, O LORD, held me up.
zh: 我說：“我失了腳”， 耶和華啊！那時你的慈愛就扶持我。

en: When the cares of my heart are many, your consolations cheer my soul.
zh: 我心裡充滿憂慮的時候， 你就安慰我，使我的心歡樂。

en: Can wicked rulers be allied with you, those who frame injustice by statute?
zh: 憑著律例製造奸惡， 藉著權位行毀滅的，怎能和你相交呢？

en: They band together against the life of the righteous and condemn the innocent to death.
zh: 他們集結起來攻擊義人， 把無辜的人定了死罪。

en: But the LORD has become my stronghold, and my God the rock of my refuge.
zh: 但耶和華作了我的高臺， 我的 神作了我避難的磐石。

en: He will bring back on them their iniquity and wipe them out for their wickedness; the LORD our God will wipe them out.
zh: 他必使他們的罪孽歸到他們身上， 他必因他們的罪惡滅絕他們； 耶和華我們的 神必把他們滅絕。
